Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x8009 "AlternativeFormats\PRGs\Uncrunched\Transformers.prg,0x0400,0x00EC" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $0c80 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $0c00 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Transformers.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added a routine at $0C00 to display the loading screen (the colour RAM is loaded for this to display correctly) and wait for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game. After the loading screen is displayed, the routine turns off interrupts from the two CIA chips and acks any pending CIA interrupts to allow the game to start correctly.
